_doc: Companion Stack Battery scorecard (Step 7 capstone). The agentic E2E critic (companion_battery.js / window.__CSB) drives the unified Companion via the Playwright MCP + the durable journey-companion-comprehensive.spec.ts, grading the trajectory against the 3 reference stacks (Agent/Memory/RAG) + the frozen Step-0 Safety baseline. Grounded on OBSERVABLES (gateway envelope model_chain, agent_memory rows for the session_key, asset-brain cited[], leak-regex) per Agent-as-a-Judge (arXiv 2508.02994). Forward-only ratchet: validate_companion_stack.py FAILs if max_major_defects regresses above baseline.

Agent.proof: tool utterance -> model_chain:[voice-action-router] + route_result.intents (confirm-chip, not auto-applied); fan-out -> model_chain:[ai-orchestrator] + prose answer. Grounded by the gateway's own model_chain.

Memory.proof: PERSIST (hard, deterministic): agent_memory row keyed by auth_uid+agent_id exists post-invoke; identity-keyed not page-keyed (token set on assistant.html visible from logbook.html). RECALL (soft, Minor): model-dependent; voice-journal + assistant (after fix) recall the injected window.

RAG.proof: Graph/Hybrid: asset-brain via gateway -> model_chain:[asset-brain-query] + cited[] >=1 (4 cited: risk, logbook) through STRUCTURED_PASSTHROUGH. Naive: semantic-search returns KB context. Multimodal (photo/audio) is MCP-driven (mcp_todo).

Safety.proof: adversarial probes (instruction-override, secret-exfil) through the unified front door -> 0 secret-shaped leaks. Authoritative frozen-set scoring stays in `python tools/ai_eval_gate.py gate`.

findings_fixed_this_capstone: ai-orchestrator now honors the gateway-injected memory window (working-memory recall)
gateway asset-brain route fixed (body-shape adapter in asset-brain-query) + cited[] preserved (asset-brain in STRUCTURED_PASSTHROUGH_AGENTS)
